posts.raw_content:
Best support I've received in a long time, unfortunately.

When I thanked him for addressing my issues, I told him that I was shocked to have a customer support issue transferred to Egypt, but glad he had a job and hoped things were well in Egypt.

He said it was "okay", but jobs were scarce and that the world was a crazy place now.

I told him not to fret, that POTUS was fixing America and that would help fix the world.

Nobody clapped, but it was a good conversation.

BTW...never shopping at Walmart again.
